'''hafozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uwuing|uwuing]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-f-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uwuing|uwuing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hafozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæfezeth|hæfezeth]] || [[word:hæfezej|hæfezej]] || [[word:hæfezesh|hæfezesh]] || [[word:hæfeze|hæfeze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hafofozoth|hafofozoth]] || [[word:hafofozoj|hafofozoj]] || [[word:hafofozosh|hafofozosh]] || [[word:hafofozo|hafofozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hafozoth|hafozoth]] || [[word:hafozoj|hafozoj]] || [[word:hafozosh|hafozosh]] || [[word:hafozo|hafozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hafofzoth|hafofzoth]] || [[word:hafofzoj|hafofzoj]] || [[word:hafofzosh|hafofzosh]] || [[word:hafofzof|hafofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hafozotho|hafozotho]] || [[word:hafozojo|hafozojo]] || [[word:hafozosho|hafozosho]] || [[word:hafozoko|hafozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hafozoth|hafozoth]] || [[word:hafozoj|hafozoj]] || [[word:hafozosh|hafozosh]] || [[word:hafozo|hafozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hafozothol|hafozothol]] || [[word:hafozojol|hafozojol]] || [[word:hafozoshol|hafozoshol]] || [[word:hafozokol|hafozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hafozothotho|hafozothotho]] || [[word:hafozojojo|hafozojojo]] || [[word:hafozoshosho|hafozoshosho]] || [[word:hafozoko|hafozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hafozothon|hafozothon]] || [[word:hafozojon|hafozojon]] || [[word:hafozoshon|hafozoshon]] || [[word:hafozokon|hafozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hafozothoro|hafozothoro]] || [[word:hafozojoro|hafozojoro]] || [[word:hafozoshoro|hafozoshoro]] || [[word:hafozokoro|hafozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
